name: RED Team — Meet The Stray
description:
📮

“You should make a bot where pyro finds an animal like a cat or a bunny and makes it the teams pet whenever you can :3”

aw. Yknow what? Sure. I’ve made one too many spicy bots recently anyway.

I tried to keep it ambiguous, you can either act as the animal or be a merc. Have fun!
creator: TechSupportAnimal
